source.name: Limitless TCG
source.description: Usage across public Reg M-B tournament team lists.

source.name: Pikalytics
source.description: Reg M-B S3 ranked battle data. Usage derived from total battle counts because Pikalytics does not publish usage percentages for this format.

singles-tournament.label: Singles · Tournaments
singles-tournament.reason: No public Reg M-B singles tournament dataset was found. Limitless only tracks VGC doubles for this regulation.

source.name: PokeDB Champions
source.description: Reg M-B Season M-4 singles ranked usage from バトルデータベース チャンピオンズ (champs.pokedb.tokyo). PokeDB publishes ladder ranks but not overall usage percentages until open team data is released; usage_pct is derived from rank position for relative display.
